settings.heading: See a Real Photo Become a Coloring Page
settings.intro: This is exactly what the generator does with your photo — clean, bold outlines with faces you'll recognize.

settings.question: Are these coloring pages really free?
settings.answer: Yes. Upload a photo, get your first coloring page free, and unlock two more by entering your email — three free pages total, print-ready at home. No app download, no credit card.

settings.question: How does the photo-to-coloring-page generator work?
settings.answer: Our AI traces your photo into clean, bold outlines — like a professional coloring book page — while keeping faces recognizable. Upload, wait about 15 seconds, and print. That's it.

settings.question: What photos work best?
settings.answer: Clear, well-lit photos where faces are visible. Kids, pets, grandparents, family moments — if you love the photo, it will make a great coloring page.

settings.question: Can I print them at home?
settings.answer: Yes — every page downloads as a print-ready file sized for standard letter paper at full print quality. Regular printer paper works; cardstock feels extra special.

settings.question: Can I turn my photos into a whole coloring book?
settings.answer: That's what we do best. A personalized coloring book turns 20–40 of your photos into a printed, hand-reviewed keepsake — and every free page you print includes a 20% off code for your book.
